meta.description: LEGO BrickLink Designer Program upcoming rounds (not yet released). Manually curated from LEGO Ideas / BrickLink official announcements and reputable community sources (brickset, jaysbrickblog, bricksfanz, hothbricks, brickfanatics). Each entry is classified by confidence level via `status` ('rumor' | 'reviewing' | 'confirmed'). The weekly GitHub Actions promote-bdp-upcoming.js script migrates `confirmed` entries whose `expectedLaunchDate` has passed into src/data/prices.json.

statusMeaning.confirmed: Officially announced by LEGO/BrickLink (finalist selected and/or launch date set).
statusMeaning.reviewing: Entered BDP review phase but not yet confirmed as finalist.
statusMeaning.rumor: Community speculation or leaks; not officially confirmed.

upcoming.notes: 1950년대 미국 디젤-전기 기관차 (1970년대 도장 버전). BDP Series 8 5인 파이널리스트 확정.
다양한 성·아카데미·건축물에서 영감을 받은 대학 캠퍼스. BDP Series 8 파이널리스트 확정.
펼치고 접을 수 있는 사막 요새. 캐슬 라인 팬을 위한 BDP Series 8 파이널리스트 확정.
LEGO 파이렛츠 창작. 스티커 0개 사용. BDP Series 8 파이널리스트 확정.
